rationale: The two papers are unusually close in substance and setting: both analyze customer-level advertising across three retailer brands and the same media (email, catalogs, paid search) in a unified database from roughly the same July 2010–June 2012 period. Given that the cited paper provides multibrand multimedia ad-response estimation (own- and cross-brand effects) and the citing paper builds a multibrand microtargeting optimization framework on customer-level response modeling, this does not look like an incidental background mention.
